{{CargoRelic
|name=Birdie
|rank=Green
|affct=FTH
|source=Defeat [[Fugitives|Ronin Katsura]]
|description=This puppet, which looks like a duck, is said to be the disguise of a powerful alien, yet no one has ever seen its real appearance. After many years of wandering on Earth, it became partners with a Samurai. <br>
Eventually, it was defeated by the snail and turned into a Relic.
|fame=17
|art=18
|fth=28
|civ=13
|tech=14
|ss1=Quarry Output +2%
|ss2=Quarry Output +4%
|ss3=Quarry Output +6%
}}

[[Category:Quarry Output Boost]]
